ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic category */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "both_parents_born_overseas_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with both parents born overseas */,
  "both_parents_born_overseas_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with both parents born overseas */,
  "father_only_born_overseas_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with father only born overseas */,
  "father_only_born_overseas_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with father only born overseas */,
  "mother_only_born_overseas_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with mother only born overseas */,
  "mother_only_born_overseas_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with mother only born overseas */,
  "neither_parent_born_overseas_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with neither parent born overseas */,
  "neither_parent_born_overseas_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with neither parent born overseas */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES demographic_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the state belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state the city belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES demographics ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being updated */,
  "updated_data" TEXT /* Description of the updated data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES demographics ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
